title: 25×25 matrix framework (Warning labels populated, cell content NOT)

fields.vision: This packet consolidates a 25-topic master framework for speechwriting, in which each topic is defined by a 25×25 grid: 25 analytical column-dimensions paired with 25 row-contexts or application formats.
fields.mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
fields.source_utilization: Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design, evidence-control, and interpretive-method systems. Mechanism: Extract argument, warrant, close reading, corpus method, reasoning, evidence, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Strengthen source governance, evidence workbench, capstone, and Nexus method pages. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact methodological passages for claim-control upgrades. Source pool: 129 deduplicated local title candidates; 136 catalogue support rows. Examples: Argumentation; From Human Reasoning to Belief. Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. 1. Use master MD as a diagnostic or drafting checklist. 2. Use matrix_manifest.json to seed automated prompt-engineering pipelines. 3. Recommended expansion order (from AUDIT_REPORT): (1) Rhetorical Foundations, (2) Political and Policy Speechwriting, (3) Crisis Speechwriting, (4) Executive and Corporate Speechwriting, (5) Ethics, Propaganda, and AI Augmentation. Wire or preserve the implementation files: audit_table.csv columns: Index, Topic, Columns, Rows, Unique_Columns, Unique_Rows (all rows report 25,25,25,25). matrix_manifest.json: machine-readable export of every topic with its column list and row list. 1,426 lines; intended for downstream prompt engineering and tooling.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This packet consolidates a 25-topic master framework for speechwriting, in which each topic is defined by a 25×25 grid: 25 analytical column-dimensions paired with 25 row-contexts or application formats. The implied conceptual space is 25 × 25 × 25 = 15,625 labeled intersections. The declared use cases are curriculum design, speech diagnosis and revision, AI prompt engineering for speechwriting, rhetorical research and comparative analysis, and institutional communications playbooks. The packet's contribution is structural: it fixes a coherent taxonomy across classical rhetoric, political/executive/crisis/ceremonial communication, narrative theory, persuasion psychology, cross-cultural communication, ethics, propaganda analysis, and AI augmentation. Per the audit, all 25 topics contain exactly 25 unique columns and 25 unique rows with zero intra-topic duplicates. What the packet explicitly does NOT include is populated cell-level content — that is deferred as...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This packet consolidates a 25-topic master framework for speechwriting, in which each topic is defined by a 25×25 grid: 25 analytical column-dimensions paired with 25 row-contexts or application formats.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.summary: This packet consolidates a 25-topic master framework for speechwriting, in which each topic is defined by a 25×25 grid: 25 analytical column-dimensions paired with 25 row-contexts or application formats.
researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.
